description: Case style: Analogue watch with a stainless steel circular case and back, has embellishments Dial style: White dial with embellished markingFeatures: A screw to reset timeStrap style: Steel-toned bracelet style metal strap with embellished detail, secured with a fold-over claspWater-resistant up to 5 mComes in a signature Fossil hard caseWarranty: 2 years
